Game.Name: Bakutou Dochers - Bumps-jima wa Oosawagi (Japan)
Game.plot: Bakutou Dodgers is an Action game, developed by Genki and published by Bullet Proof Software,which was released in Japan in 1994.Cheat: PasswordsAt the title screen choose the second selection down and enter the following combination.Cheat: Special level accessThe game ends after the beach level but if you wait through the credits and the end screen youll be sent to the final level Space.Cheat: Special level accessTo get a whole different set of levels for the entire game hold L an R when you turn the game on. If done correctly the start screen will be red.
